basics.description:
## Conosco Managed Sentinel

Deploys the Microsoft Sentinel infrastructure for a client tenant: Log Analytics workspace (90-day retention, pay-as-you-go), the Sentinel solution, and Sentinel onboarding. All resources are provisioned in **UK South**.

> **Two-step deployment.** This template provisions the workspace and onboards Sentinel only. After it completes, run `Configure-SentinelSettings.ps1` signed in as the onboarding administrator to enable UEBA, the data connectors, and playbook permissions. Those steps require Entra directory roles that a template can't hold, so they run in your own context.

basics.name: clientName
basics.label: Client identifier
basics.toolTip: Short lowercase identifier for the client. Used to name all resources: cns-<identifier>-sentinel. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.

validations.message: 2-20 characters. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.

options.text: All resources are deployed to UK South. The resource group location does not need to match.
